EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.domain}\{subject.name} changed settings of logging or scripts running of Zgate on host {dst.host} from host {src.host}
User {subject.domain}\{subject.name} changed settings of filter on host {dst.host} from host {src.host}
User {subject.domain}\{subject.name} changed settings of license management Zgate on host {dst.host} from host {src.host}
User {subject.domain}\{subject.name} changed settings of transfer on host {dst.host} from host {src.host}
User {subject.domain}\{subject.name} changed settings of Web-proxy Zgate on host {dst.host} from host {src.host}
